---
title: "perimeter_sweep.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\perimeter_sweep.py"
loc: 191
complexity: 31
logic_score: 0.50
style_score: 3.77
intel_score: 4.75
overall_score: 1.92
---

## Intent
The `perimeter_sweep.py` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on PerimeterSweep, __init__, _run_pip_audit, _run_npm_audit, _manor_cleanup, analyze, _write_report, _render_report, main. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via PerimeterSweep, __init__, _run_pip_audit, _run_npm_audit, _manor_cleanup, analyze, _write_report, _render_report, main. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 0.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.8/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 11 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [argparse](file://argparse)
- [json](file://json)
- [logging](file://logging)
- [subprocess](file://subprocess)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [time](file://time)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [typing](file://typing)
- [contextlib](file://contextlib)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)

### Exports
- `PerimeterSweep`
- `__init__`
- `_run_pip_audit`
- `_run_npm_audit`
- `_manor_cleanup`
- `analyze`
- `_write_report`
- `_render_report`
- `main`
